tagline: We work in afternoon light, on skin that has been listened to.
concept: Editorial-quality med spa built around one large window-lit portrait, an ink-underlining treatment menu, and a first-visit intake form written like a letter.

meta.title: Lumen Aesthetics — An editorial med spa in San Francisco
meta.description: A small, quiet, afternoon-light med spa on Nob Hill. Botox, filler, microneedling, and skin studies — by consultation, by appointment, by a practitioner who runs on time.

voice.agentGreeting: Hi, I'm Ella — ask me anything about Lumen Aesthetics.
